{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231543584E22B747E6458EBF1A14"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7133887232163005196","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，女主杀伐果断，有仇当场报，目前不圣母，就是我有点疑问，就是女主空间是怎么样的？空间能进活物，那么女主本人能进去吗？看了十多章了，还没看到有关这方面的描写","text_exts":[{"e":10,"s":6,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742518398EBF1A14%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227133887232163005196%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227125300592515222543%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1660987660,"group_id":"7125300592515222543","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"文笔有限，实在不知道怎么表达自己。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nyca3JOv0tRqkvQR79F7EgI=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3fa6da3991814504b13fb7a8b5d24e46~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795322&x-signature=2zUUp5wO%2Bse134Yv3dz9MlPd%2FZE%3D","user_id":"817641779627389","user_name":"慕斯晨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"817641779627389","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1742569709,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7125300592515222543","book_info":{"abstract":"【团宠+系统+种田经商+基建+异能】
一朝穿越，欠了天道百亿功德，作为异能特战队队长的晏清辞表示不慌。
爷爷是三朝帝师，爹爹是当朝左相，姑姑是中宫皇后……可谁知隔天全家都被皇帝赶出京城。
晏清辞看着一大家子手不能提肩不能抗的文人书生，感到鸭梨山大。
幸好她有异能在手，带着系统种田经商，做美食，搞基建，理科大佬带飞全家。
可谁知半路突然冒出来一个自称是她未婚夫的野男人缠着她耍无赖。
野男人霍云沉：为清清痴为清清狂为清清哐哐撞大墙。
晏清辞：男人只会影响我赚钱的速度。
路过的霍云沉火速奉上几座金矿。
看着男人闪着亮光的狗狗眼，晏清辞犹豫：再来个自带嫁妆的美人相公也不是不行。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oc6886c750564b75c57ea440434f44205~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"雾都胖仔","author_id":"","book_id":"7125300592515222543","book_name":"团宠：我在古代种田基建当首富","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":94,"name":"团宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=94&name=团宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7125304121468879398","read_count":"6","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"145716"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"69","tags":"种田,古代言情,系统,穿越,美食,团宠,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oc6886c750564b75c57ea440434f44205~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435839&x-signature=ST%2FjiGQGYH9SF9716hvXMhyt5D4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3246233288181095","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.317716e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231543584E22B747E6458EBF1A14"}
